mapper.select: SELECT A.IDX, A.FORMAL_ID, A.SENTENCE_ID, B.STANDARD, B.STYLE, B.STYLE_TEXT, B.VERSION, B.MERGE_WAY, B.SUM_WAY, B.QUARTER, B.END_TERM, B.START_DT, B.END_DT, C.ID AS TABLE_SET_ID, C.DATA, D.TEXT FROM TREE_GROUP_DETAIL A LEFT JOIN FORMAL B ON B.ID = A.FORMAL_ID LEFT JOIN TABLE_SET C ON C.FORMAL_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN SENTENCE D ON D.ID = A.SENTENCE_ID WHERE A.TREE_GROUP_ID = #{treeGroupId} ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT A.IDX, A.FORMAL_ID, A.SENTENCE_ID, B.STANDARD, B.STYLE, B.STYLE_TEXT, B.VERSION, B.MERGE_WAY, B.SUM_WAY, B.QUARTER, B.END_TERM, B.START_DT, B.END_DT, C.ID AS TABLE_SET_ID, NVL(E.DATA,C.DATA) AS DATA, NVL(F.TEXT,D.TEXT) AS TEXT, NVL(E.USER_ID,F.USER_ID) AS USER_ID FROM TREE_GROUP_DETAIL A LEFT JOIN FORMAL B ON B.ID = A.FORMAL_ID LEFT JOIN TABLE_SET C ON C.FORMAL_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN SENTENCE D ON D.ID = A.SENTENCE_ID LEFT JOIN TABLE_SET_USER E ON E.FORMAL_ID = B.ID AND E.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN SENTENCE_USER F ON F.SENTENCE_ID = D.ID AND F.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE A.TREE_GROUP_ID = #{treeGroupId} ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT A.IDX, A.FORMAL_ID, A.SENTENCE_ID, B.STANDARD, B.STYLE, B.STYLE_TEXT, B.VERSION, B.MERGE_WAY, B.SUM_WAY, B.QUARTER, B.END_TERM, B.START_DT, B.END_DT, C.ID AS TABLE_SET_ID, C.DATA AS DEFAULT_DATA, NVL(E.DATA,C.DATA) AS DATA, NVL(F.TEXT,D.TEXT) AS TEXT, NVL(E.USER_ID,F.USER_ID) AS USER_ID, TO_CHAR(E.UPDATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DT FROM TREE_GROUP_DETAIL A LEFT JOIN FORMAL B ON B.ID = A.FORMAL_ID LEFT JOIN TABLE_SET C ON C.FORMAL_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN SENTENCE D ON D.ID = A.SENTENCE_ID LEFT JOIN TABLE_SET_USER E ON E.FORMAL_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN SENTENCE_USER F ON F.SENTENCE_ID = D.ID WHERE A.TREE_GROUP_ID = #{treeGroupId} ORDER BY IDX ASC, UPDATE_DT DESC
